Why Downsells Are the 2nd Most Important Part
Of Your Upsell Funnel
- What is a downsell? It’s an offer you make when
someone says “NO” to your upsell offer
Example...
Upsell #1 - $497
-> if the buyer says “NO” then you take them to a
downsell.
-> downsell #1 - buy the same product for 5 monthly
payments of $97
-> Or downsell #1 could be a smaller version of that
product for $197
SHOW EXAMPLE -4patriots72hour
Why are downsells important?
- Significantly boost the AOV of your offer
- Usually convert better than 2nd and 3rd upsells
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

Which downsells work best
- Payment plans
- same offer as 1st upsell, but on a payment plan
- $99 a month for 5 months (instead of $497)
- work well for high-priced products
- Lower price (works well for info products)
- $97 -> $47 (example)
- Smaller quantity (if physical product)
- ex. 3 month supply of survival food -> 4 week supply
- ex. 5 bottles of supplement -> 3 bottles of supp
- Add valuable products to the 1st offer you made to
them (pile on more stuff to make it irresistible)
- literally same offer but PILE on other products to
make it really hard to say no (very smart to do on
digital products)
Formatting
- Either plain text page or text + video at top
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

-can usually get away with a short page simply
showing the price change (or payment option)
